title: JSON Unsigned Integer out of range for Unsigned Bigint column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tb9 (b UInt64, c String);
INSERT INTO tb9 (b, c) VALUES (CAST(9223372036854775808 AS UInt64), '{"value": null}');
SELECT b, JSONExtractString(c, 'value') AS extracted_value FROM tb9;
key_bug_features: Inserting JSON value exceeding unsigned bigint range
